config.babyzombieaddons.title: BabyzombieAddons Config
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyAlli:
Respond to !allinv in party chat to toggle all-invite.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?all(?:inv)?(?:ite)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyInvi:
Respond to !p <name> in party chat to invite a player.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?p ([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyWarp:
Respond to !warp in party chat to warp the party.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?wa?r?p?$

Delay warp for N seconds with cancel support.
Cancel Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:wa?r?p?)?[ ]?c(?:ancel)?$
How many seconds to wait before warping.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyJoin:
Respond to !join f1/m2/t3 to join dungeon/kuudra instances.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:join)?[ ]?([fmt])([e0-7])$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partySend:
Respond to !sc in party chat to send your coordinates.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:s)?(?:end)?[ ]?c(?:oord|oords)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyPlay:
Respond to !play <content> in party chat to execute /play <content>.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?play(?: (.+))?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyTran:
Respond to !pt or !ptme in party chat to transfer party leader.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?pt(?:me)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dmPartyIn:
Auto-invite players who send you a DM with !p.
Regex: ^From (.+): [!！][ ]?p(?:arty)?(?: .*)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partySelf: When enabled, party chat commands sent by yourself will also be executed.
config.babyzombieaddons.category.popup.d: Accept and Ignore keybinds can be changed in the game's Controls settings.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.updateChe: Check for new versions on GitHub when joining a world.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autois.de: When joining SkyBlock, automatically warp to your island or garden.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoisDel: How long to wait before warping after joining a world.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoBackT: What to do after being kicked.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.cakeBuffT: Replace default cake messages with a checklist of consumed cakes.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.skipSecon: Skip second-person view when pressing F5, cycling only between first-person and third-person back. Hold longer than the set tick count to switch to second-person. Set to 0 to disable, 20 ticks = 1 second.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoRecon: Auto-reconnect after being disconnected from a server.
How many seconds to wait before reconnecting.
Maximum retry attempts after a failed reconnect. Set to 0 for unlimited. Resets on successful join.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.useTpsAdj: Use server tick rate to adjust timer speeds. On laggy servers, cooldowns will slow down to match actual game time instead of using real wall-clock time.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showCross: Show the crosshair in the center of the screen even when in third-person view.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playerSca: Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the X (width) axis.
Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the Y (height) axis.
Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the Z (depth) axis.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.renderPha: Controls when boxes, beams, and floating text are rendered.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.f4CrowdHi: Handle spectator crowd in Floor 4 boss room.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.muteStorm: Cancel all thunder sounds for 22 seconds after Storm dies.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoChest: Automatically close chest GUIs after looting.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dungeonRe:
Automatically /instancerequeue after dungeon end.
Use /dt to manually cancel auto requeue.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.kuudraReq:
Automatically /instancerequeue after Kuudra end.
Use /dt to manually cancel auto requeue.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dungeonRe: How many seconds to wait before requeuing. 0 = instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.kuudraReq: How many seconds to wait before requeuing. 0 = instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueMe: Party message sent before requeuing. %delay% = wait time.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueCa: Party message sent when auto requeue is cancelled.
Pipe-separated keywords that cancel auto requeue from party chat.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hpDisplay: Show Kuudra HP on HUD or boss bar.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.phaseTime: Record and display time for each Kuudra phase.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.stunTimer: Stun duration, knockdown, and P4 countdown display.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.supplyBea: Beacon beams on supply crates during Rescue Supplies phase.
Color of the supply crate beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.supplyDro: Beacon beams on supply drop-off locations.
Color of the supply drop-off beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaP: Show ballista build progress text above build sites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaT: Color of the ballista progress text.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaB: Beacon beams on ballista build sites during Protect Elle phase.
Color of the ballista build site beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fuelOrbBe: Beacon beams on fuel cell / orb carriers.
Color of the fuel cell / orb beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.direction: Magma cube icon pointing toward Kuudra in P4.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.toxicArro: Toxic arrow refill only triggers in Kuudra at or above this tier.
When to refill Toxic Arrow Poison. Refill amount is controlled by the threshold option below. 0 = off.
Target amount of Toxic Arrow Poison to refill to via /gfs when the selected timing triggers. 0 = off.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.twilightA: When to refill Twilight Arrow Poison (T5 only). Refill amount is controlled by the threshold option below. 0 = off.
Target amount of Twilight Arrow Poison to refill to via /gfs when the selected timing triggers in T5. 0 = off.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.enderPear: Auto /gfs ender pearl on instance start or low count.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.perkShopB: Prevent accidental purchase of blacklisted Perk Shop items.
Full item names, separated by commas.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.followerH: Calculate today's Kuudra Follower Helmet price.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.muteCrims: Cancel piston sound when Crimson Isle armor stacks are full (10 stacks).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pigmanSwo: Show cooldown timer on HUD after Pigman Sword triggers.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.holyIceTi: Show Holy Ice usage timer on HUD in the Rift.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ragnarock: Show Ragnarock Axe related info in a HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.endStoneS: Show duration and damage resistance %. Can also prevent re-use during active duration.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.noslayerq: Remind you after failing a quest if you keep killing mobs without taking a new one (requires Champion enchant on weapon).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.reheatedG: Show remaining time of Re-heated Gummy Polar Bear. Alerts at 5min, 2min, 1min left and on expiration.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxLowHPB: Mark Bloodfiend bosses below 20% HP with a colored indicator. When this marker appears, you can use Steak Stake to execute.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showEffig: Show remaining blood pillars in the Rift castle based on scoreboard.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.zombieSla: Show Revenant Horror boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.spiderSla: Show Tarantula Broodfather boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.wolfSlaye: Show Sven Packmaster boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.endermanS: Show Voidgloom Seraph boss HP, lazer timer and beacon status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.blazeSlay: Show Inferno Demonlord boss HP, attunement and minion status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.vampireSl: Show Riftstalker Bloodfiend boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxSlayer: Draw a bounding box around the slayer boss.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossCo: Color of the slayer boss bounding box and beam.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossBe: Draw a beacon beam on the slayer boss and its minions.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossRe: When enabled, the boss box is visible even behind walls.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossLi: Line width of the slayer boss wireframe box (1-16). Default: 5.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.witherClo: Track Wither Cloak activation, deactivation, and cooldown.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.alignedTi: Show 6-second alignment duration and source player.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideCharg: Hide invisible charged creepers within 2 blocks when Wither Cloak is active.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.miningAbi: Title/sound alerts when mining abilities are ready or used.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.chestLine: Width of chest marker lines (1-16). Default 3.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.getFromSa: Auto-extract keys, eggs, and apparatus from sacks.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.armadillo: Show current/max energy with color transition.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.drillSwin: Prevent arm swinging animation while mining.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.powderMin: Remove XP orb sounds and replace chest sounds.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.greatGlac: Mark Great Glacite locations in the Glacite area.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.creeperVi: Reveal invisible creepers in The Mist / Gunpowder Mines.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.glaciteMi: Behavior when a portal is found.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.suspiciou: Show suspicious scrap count on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pestDispl: Show beacon beams on garden pests.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.xpOrbSoun: XP orb sound volume when breaking crops while holding an axe or hoe in the Garden. 0 = fully muted, 100 = unchanged.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.signAutoR: Right-click a sign while holding a hoe or axe to auto-rotate and cancel interaction. Write "yaw: value" and "pitch: value" on any sign line (case-insensitive).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.trevorAut: Automatically accept Trevor the Trapper's hunting task by clicking [YES] for you.
Automatically /call trevor_the_trapper 31 seconds after the hunting task starts, once the previous animal is found.
babyzombieaddons.trevor.auto_call_disabl: §7Click to disable auto-call until world change
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupPart: Show a popup when someone invites you to a party.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupGuil: Show a popup for guild-wide party invites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupFrie: Show a popup when someone sends a friend request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDuel: Show a popup when someone invites you to a duel.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupSkyb: Show a popup when someone sends a trade request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDung: Show a popup when party leader requests a restart.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.greatSpoo: Auto-solve QUICK MATHS, respond to Public Speaking Demon, and click HERE buttons.
Add a random half-to-one-second delay so it doesn't look too instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.publicSpe: Text to auto-send when the Speaking Demon asks to say something interesting. Leave empty for random text.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fruitDigg: Mark dug fruit locations and nearby treasure at Carnival.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.carnivalA: Double-click the Carnival minigame NPC on the second+ encounter to auto-accept.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bzGetFrom: Auto-extract items from sacks when creating a Bazaar sell offer with "None in inventory!".
config.babyzombieaddons.option.abiphoneG: Replace /call with a graphical contact list.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playCmd.d: Replace /play with a game mode selection GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.raredropM: Open the rare drop blacklist and share list manager.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.configBac: Choose between YACL and MoulConfig rendering for the settings GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hudEdit.d: Enter HUD edit mode to drag and resize HUD elements.
playcmd.title: Play
rareropscreen.title: Rare Drop Manager
config.babyzombieaddons.option.debugMode: Show all HUD elements in edit screen (including disabled ones) to help with layout.
babyzombieaddons.popup.body.party_invite: %s invites you to join their party
babyzombieaddons.popup.body.guild_party_: %s invites guild to join their party
babyzombieaddons.sound.hover:
§7Click to ignore §f%s
§7Click again to restore
§7/bza sound clear to clear all
babyzombieaddons.ch.nucleus: §bReady to /warp nucleus, click the crystal again
slayer.noslayerquest.warning: §cYou forgot to take a slayer quest!
babyzombieaddons.waypoint.invalid_coord: §cInvalid coordinate, use an integer or ~ notation
babyzombieaddons.help:
§6§lBabyzombieAddons Commands
§6/bza §7- Open settings GUI
§6/bza play §7- Open game mode menu
§6/bza sc [channel] [suffix] §7- Send your coordinates
§6/bza la [channel] [suffix] §7- Send looked-at coordinates
§6/bza yaw <yaw> <pitch> §7- Set player rotation
§6/bza l §7- Go to Limbo
§6/bza wp §7- Waypoint manager, type /bza wp for usage
babyzombieaddons.waypoint.usage:
§6/bza wp add <x> <y> <z> <name> [seconds]  §7- Add at coords
§6/bza wp add here <name> [seconds]      §7- Add at current position
§6/bza wp add looking <name> [seconds]   §7- Add at looking-at position
§6/bza wp delete <name>                  §7- Delete waypoint
§7Seconds: -1 = permanent, 0 = clear on world change, >0 = auto-expire
